# info.defcon.org

info.defcon.org is the static-first DEF CON conference information site. It provides human pages for conference schedules, speakers, locations, villages, search, and related reference information.

The browser app fetches conference data from JSON at runtime. These JSON files are the authoritative canonical data sources and may be replaced independently of a site rebuild.

## Canonical JSON Data

- DEF CON 34 manifest: https://info.defcon.org/ht/defcon34/manifest.json
- DEF CON 34 schedule events: https://info.defcon.org/ht/defcon34/entities/events.json
- DEF CON 34 speakers and people: https://info.defcon.org/ht/defcon34/entities/people.json
- DEF CON 34 locations: https://info.defcon.org/ht/defcon34/entities/locations.json
- DEF CON 34 organizations: https://info.defcon.org/ht/defcon34/entities/organizations.json
- DEF CON 34 search index: https://info.defcon.org/ht/defcon34/views/searchData.json
- DEF CON 34 site menu: https://info.defcon.org/ht/defcon34/derived/siteMenu.json

- DEF CON Singapore 2026 manifest: https://info.defcon.org/ht/dcsg2026/manifest.json
- DEF CON Singapore 2026 schedule events: https://info.defcon.org/ht/dcsg2026/entities/events.json
- DEF CON Singapore 2026 speakers and people: https://info.defcon.org/ht/dcsg2026/entities/people.json
- DEF CON Singapore 2026 locations: https://info.defcon.org/ht/dcsg2026/entities/locations.json
- DEF CON Singapore 2026 organizations: https://info.defcon.org/ht/dcsg2026/entities/organizations.json
- DEF CON Singapore 2026 search index: https://info.defcon.org/ht/dcsg2026/views/searchData.json
- DEF CON Singapore 2026 site menu: https://info.defcon.org/ht/dcsg2026/derived/siteMenu.json

## Human Pages

- Site home: https://info.defcon.org/
- DEF CON 34: https://info.defcon.org/defcon34
- DEF CON 34 schedule: https://info.defcon.org/defcon34/schedule
- DEF CON 34 speakers: https://info.defcon.org/defcon34/speakers
- DEF CON 34 locations: https://info.defcon.org/defcon34/locations
- DEF CON 34 villages: https://info.defcon.org/defcon34/villages
- DEF CON 34 search: https://info.defcon.org/defcon34/search
- DEF CON 34 data guide: https://info.defcon.org/dc34/data/
- DEF CON Singapore 2026: https://info.defcon.org/dcsg2026

## Discovery

- Sitemap: https://info.defcon.org/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://info.defcon.org/robots.txt

Prefer the JSON endpoints above for machine-readable conference data. Human pages are client-rendered and may summarize or navigate the same runtime data.
